title: The One with Ross and Monica's Cousin

jokes.text: Practicing blowing you off. I'm gonna be a big movie star!
jokes.setup: Friend asks about audition results
jokes.punchline: Joey is literally practicing being rude as preparation for fame
jokes.explanation: Good character moment for Joey's naive confidence, solid misdirection structure

jokes.text: The director's supposed to be the next-next Martin Scorsese.
jokes.setup: Joey describing the prestigious director
jokes.punchline: The confusing hierarchy of 'next-next' directors
jokes.explanation: Clever absurdist logic, very economical, Joey's optimistic delusion perfectly captured

jokes.text: A guy from Chicago's supposed to be the next Martin Scorsese. This guy's right after him.
jokes.setup: Question about the confusing 'next-next' terminology
jokes.punchline: Joey's earnest explanation of the succession line
jokes.explanation: Perfect Joey logic - treats absurd concept as completely reasonable

jokes.text: Are you kidding me? I never rent a movie without it!
jokes.setup: Agent asks if he has a problem with full-frontal nudity
jokes.punchline: Joey misunderstands and reveals his movie preferences
jokes.explanation: Great misdirection with perfect Joey character voice - perverted but innocent

jokes.text: My grandmother's gonna see this. - Grandma's gonna have to get in line.
jokes.setup: Joey worried about grandmother seeing him naked
jokes.punchline: Chandler implies massive audience demand
jokes.explanation: Excellent economy and structure, Chandler's supportive sarcasm perfectly executed

jokes.text: I have one of those with every woman in America.
jokes.setup: Discussion of Monica and Chandler's no-sex pact
jokes.punchline: Chandler's self-deprecating admission of his dating failures
jokes.explanation: Perfect Chandler self-deprecation, economical delivery, character-specific humor

jokes.text: I wonder if she still carries a Barbie everywhere? - She's 25 years old. - So? I still... You're probably right.
jokes.setup: Monica wondering if cousin still carries Barbie dolls
jokes.punchline: Ross almost admits to still having toys at his age
jokes.explanation: Good character reveal for Ross's childish side, nice self-awareness beat

jokes.text: Oh, my God. We have to throw her a shower?
jokes.setup: Monica catches them planning surprise shower
jokes.punchline: Phoebe realizes they haven't actually planned anything
jokes.explanation: Classic sitcom incompetence reveal, Phoebe's ditzy delivery works

jokes.text: That's what you say about porn.
jokes.setup: Joey explaining nudity is important to the story
jokes.punchline: Chandler points out this is the universal porn excuse
jokes.explanation: Perfect economy, sharp observational humor, great Chandler voice

jokes.text: Plus, everyone is gonna see your thing.
jokes.setup: Joey's romantic description of tender love scene
jokes.punchline: Chandler cuts through the romance with blunt reality
jokes.explanation: Excellent structure - undercuts Joey's romantic fantasy with crude reality, perfect Chandler

jokes.text: Well, if we make it yesterday, woo-hoo, we're done.
jokes.setup: Rachel mentions yesterday as an impossible option for the shower
jokes.punchline: Phoebe finds the silver lining in impossibility
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Phoebe logic - finds optimism in temporal impossibility, very original

jokes.text: Just calm down, woman! ...Phoebe, I already did. ...All right, then I need to calm down.
jokes.setup: Rachel having a meltdown about party planning
jokes.punchline: Confusion about who needs to calm down
jokes.explanation: Functional confusion comedy, not particularly memorable but works in context

jokes.text: And chili. - Ah, you went one too far.
jokes.setup: Planning elegant finger foods for Monica's shower
jokes.punchline: Phoebe suggests incongruous chili, Rachel shuts it down
jokes.explanation: Good contrast between elegant and messy, economical delivery

jokes.text: Lusts of the Flesh. ...I don't know. Cowboy theme?
jokes.setup: Asked for shower theme suggestions
jokes.punchline: Phoebe offers wildly inappropriate then random suggestions
jokes.explanation: Classic Phoebe randomness, inappropriate followed by non-sequitur

jokes.text: What do you think, bossy and domineering? ...The wedding's off, sloppy and immature. ...Get rid of her, obsessive and shrill! ...Shrill? The wedding is back on.
jokes.setup: Chandler and Monica playfully insulting each other to justify breaking up temporarily
jokes.punchline: Monica takes offense at 'shrill' specifically
jokes.explanation: Good escalation comedy, Monica's specific reaction to 'shrill' feels character-accurate

jokes.text: I wasn't staring. I was listening intently. It's called being a good conversationalist.
jokes.setup: Caught staring at attractive cousin
jokes.punchline: Chandler's elaborate justification for obvious behavior
jokes.explanation: Good Chandler defensiveness, creative excuse for obvious behavior

jokes.text: You were staring about eight inches south of there.
jokes.setup: Chandler claims he was listening intently to Cassie's face
jokes.punchline: Monica specifies exactly where he was actually looking
jokes.explanation: Excellent economy, specific and visual, Monica's directness works perfectly

jokes.text: So this Aunt Marilyn, is she coming to the wedding? ...Wafer-thin ice.
jokes.setup: Chandler asking about attractive aunt after being caught staring
jokes.punchline: Monica's warning about his precarious situation
jokes.explanation: Great visual metaphor, Monica's controlled anger, Chandler's inability to stop

jokes.text: You made a bad decision and ruined your movie. Good day!
jokes.setup: Joey thinks he's been rejected for the movie role
jokes.punchline: His dramatic, offended exit before hearing the full story
jokes.explanation: Perfect Joey drama and premature reaction, good character consistency

jokes.text: And scene. ...Huh? Wasn't that fun? We did a little improv there. Yeah!
jokes.setup: Joey realizes he misunderstood and overreacted
jokes.punchline: He tries to play it off as intentional performance
jokes.explanation: Excellent character move - Joey's ability to reframe embarrassment as intentional performance

jokes.text: Bar mitzvah-ed?
jokes.setup: Trying to understand circumcision euphemisms
jokes.punchline: Joey's confused attempt to use correct terminology
jokes.explanation: Good Joey confusion, mixing religious ceremony with physical state

jokes.text: This is not like learning to ride a horse. This is like learning to...grow a turtleneck.
jokes.setup: Joey comparing circumcision reversal to learning skills
jokes.punchline: Chandler's absurd but accurate metaphor
jokes.explanation: Brilliant metaphor - perfectly captures impossibility while being hilariously specific. Great visual imagery, highly quotable, classic Chandler wit.

jokes.text: I'm thinking...double-sided tape and some sort of luncheon meat.
jokes.setup: Chandler offering to help with Joey's anatomical problem
jokes.punchline: His specific, disgusting solution
jokes.explanation: Wonderfully specific and gross, good escalation of the absurd premise

jokes.text: Olive loaf? I hope that won't work.
jokes.setup: Chandler looking through foods for Joey's fake anatomy
jokes.punchline: His horror at the implications of using olive loaf
jokes.explanation: Good continuation of meat theme, Chandler's disgust is relatable

jokes.text: No, it's, um, more like a wrap.
jokes.setup: Asked if he's making Joey a sandwich
jokes.punchline: Chandler's food metaphor for the anatomical construction
jokes.explanation: Clever food pun that works on multiple levels, good euphemistic humor

jokes.text: Last time I saw you...you were setting up your tent in line for Return of the Jedi. ...So you did see me that day. Because it seemed like you didn't.
jokes.setup: Ross reminiscing about last seeing Cassie
jokes.punchline: Cassie reveals he ignored her completely
jokes.explanation: Good awkward past revelation, sets up Ross's social awkwardness

jokes.text: Oh, my God! You do a great Chandler!
jokes.setup: Ross doing an impression or mannerism
jokes.punchline: Cassie thinks he's imitating Chandler when he's just being awkward
jokes.explanation: Implies visual gag where Ross's natural awkwardness resembles Chandler

jokes.text: Well, maybe after we get re-acquainted, uh, you could do me. Yeah. No!
jokes.setup: Innocent suggestion about impressions
jokes.punchline: Sexual double entendre realized by Ross immediately
jokes.explanation: Standard sexual misdirection, Ross's quick backtrack is character-appropriate

jokes.text: Cassie, how you...? How you doing on that...hot dog?
jokes.setup: Ross trying to have normal conversation with attractive cousin
jokes.punchline: He's clearly distracted by her eating suggestively
jokes.explanation: Visual gag implied, Ross's discomfort clear but predictable setup

jokes.text: It took you that long to figure it out, huh? ...Um, I'm a little slow. ...Just as our children would be.
jokes.setup: Ross admitting he's slow to realize things
jokes.punchline: He immediately imagines their hypothetical children inheriting this trait
jokes.explanation: Dark and subversive - Ross immediately jumps to having children with his cousin, excellent character-driven absurdity

jokes.text: There's a word for people like that: Losers.
jokes.setup: People who could attend a party on 24 hours notice
jokes.punchline: Rachel's blunt categorization
jokes.explanation: Sharp observational humor, good economy, though somewhat predictable

jokes.text: I'm interested to find out who's been doing her taxes the last four years.
jokes.setup: Guest reveals she was Monica's accountant four years ago
jokes.punchline: Professional concern about Monica's current tax situation
jokes.explanation: Decent character-specific humor for an accountant, but not particularly memorable

jokes.text: Okay, this one's a mushroom cap. Uh, this one is made of bologna. ...And... And the toothpicks? ...Just until the glue dries.
jokes.setup: Chandler presenting options for Joey's fake anatomy
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of toothpicks and glue as construction methods
jokes.explanation: Excellent absurdist visual comedy, the casual engineering discussion is hilarious

jokes.text: I also did a little something in fur, but, uh, that's really just for me.
jokes.setup: Showing Joey various prosthetic options
jokes.punchline: Chandler admits to making one for his own purposes
jokes.explanation: Subversive reveal about Chandler's motivations, economical and unexpected

jokes.text: Ow. ...Toothpick? Yeah. ...What are you trying now? The Fruit Roll-up. ...And? Delicious.
jokes.setup: Joey testing the various prosthetic options
jokes.punchline: Pain from toothpicks and Joey eating the Fruit Roll-up version
jokes.explanation: Good physical comedy sequence, Joey's food obsession even in this context is character-perfect

jokes.text: She's your cousin. She's your cousin.
jokes.setup: Ross trying to resist attraction to Cassie
jokes.punchline: His internal mantra failing to work
jokes.explanation: Good internal struggle setup, Ross's moral conflict clear but predicable

jokes.text: She was the one that wanted to rent Logan's Run...the sexiest movie ever.
jokes.setup: Ross rationalizing Cassie's behavior as flirtatious
jokes.punchline: His bizarre choice of 'sexiest movie ever'
jokes.explanation: Perfect Ross - nerdy sci-fi movie as 'sexiest ever' is brilliantly character-specific and absurd

jokes.text: I know that look. Forget it. I want it. She wants it. I'm going in.
jokes.setup: Ross's internal rationalization building
jokes.punchline: His terrible decision-making process and military-style commitment
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of Ross's bad judgment, military metaphor works for his dramatic personality

jokes.text: Oh, my God, this is the longest...that anyone has not talked ever!
jokes.setup: Ross trying to make a move but unable to speak
jokes.punchline: His panicked realization about the extended silence
jokes.explanation: Good anxiety comedy, Ross's overthinking perfectly captured in the awkward beat

jokes.text: I haven't had sex in a very long time. ...Yeah, you really shouldn't have said anything.
jokes.setup: Ross desperately trying to break uncomfortable silence
jokes.punchline: His choice of topic makes everything infinitely worse
jokes.explanation: Perfect cringe comedy - Ross making bad situation catastrophically worse, Cassie's deadpan response ideal

jokes.text: First, for forgetting to throw you a bridal shower. Then, forgetting to invite you to it.
jokes.setup: Apologizing to Monica for shower mishaps
jokes.punchline: The layered incompetence of their mistakes
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of failures, efficient structure showing complete disaster

jokes.text: Now I get to spend my shower with the only people I really love. I get all those presents without talking to people I don't even like!
jokes.setup: Monica finding silver lining in the disaster
jokes.punchline: Her cynical but practical view of social obligations
jokes.explanation: Good Monica character moment - finding practical advantage in social disaster

jokes.text: I totally understand you need to...make sure I don't have any horrible scars or tattoos. Don't you worry. I have nothing to hide.
jokes.setup: Joey thinking this is a normal physical inspection
jokes.punchline: His confident misunderstanding of what they're actually checking
jokes.explanation: Good Joey obliviousness, his innocent confidence in wrong situation

jokes.text: I tell you, that has never happened before.
jokes.setup: Joey presumably revealing his prosthetic has failed or been discovered
jokes.punchline: His embarrassed attempt to save face
jokes.explanation: Standard embarrassment recovery line, functional but not particularly clever

jokes.text: What? Say something. Say anything. Ask her out! She's not your cousin!
jokes.setup: Ross apparently confused about Cassie's identity
jokes.punchline: His realization leading to immediate romantic pursuit
jokes.explanation: Decent resolution of cousin confusion, though somewhat predictable twist

tmdb_overview: Joey auditions nude for a film role requiring an uncircumcised man. Rachel and Phoebe organize Monica's bridal shower. Ross becomes attracted to his visiting cousin.
